texHtml:
There are 15 giraffes in a group. The table gives information about the heights of the 15 giraffes.
One giraffe has a height of 2.6 m.
No giraffe is shorter than 2.5 m.
The range of heights for the 15 giraffes is 2.3 m.
More than 3 giraffes have the same height.
The modal height for the giraffes is 3.9 m.
The stem-and-leaf diagram shows information about the height of 9 of these giraffes.
25
32   7   7
41   1   4   5   7
Key: 4 $|$ 1 represents a giraffe height of 4.1 m Use the information in the table to complete the stem-and-leaf diagram for the group of 15 giraffes.

**[2025 May/June, 0580/23, Question 7]**

Work out.

(a) $\dfrac{5}{7} - \dfrac{6}{12}$

Give your answer as a fraction in its simplest form.

(b)$1\frac{8}{3} \times \dfrac{15}{40}$

Give your answer as a mixed number in its simplest form.

**[2025 May/June, 0580/23, Question 8]**

(a) Write 42 as a product of its prime factors.

(b)Find the highest common factor (HCF) of 84 and 70.

**[2025 May/June, 0580/23, Question 9]**

(a) Solve.
$5x^2 = 12 - 17x$

 or 

(b)$ax^2 + a = b$ where a and b are integers.

One solution of this equation is $x = 6$.

Write down the other solution.

**[2025 May/June, 0580/23, Question 11]**

Angela picks a number at random from the numbers 1, 2 and 3.
She then picks a number at random from the numbers 4, 5 and 6.
She adds the two numbers to find the total.

(a) Complete the table to show the possible outcomes.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
+ & 1 & 2 & 3 \\
\hline
4 & 5 & 6 & 7 \\
\hline
5 & 6 & 7 & 8 \\
\hline
6 & 7 & 8 & 9 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

(b)Given that the total is odd, find the probability that one of the numbers Angela picks is 3.
texHtml:
**[2025 May/June, 0580/23, Question 11]** Angela picks a number at random from the numbers 1, 2 and 3. She then picks a number at random from the numbers 4, 5 and 6. She adds the two numbers to find the total. (a) Complete the table to show the possible outcomes.
+123
4567
5678
6789
(b)Given that the total is odd, find the probability that one of the numbers Angela picks is 3.
